title: Hire through the Atlantic Immigration Program: How the program works for employers - Canada.ca
content:
## Hire through the Atlantic Immigration Program
The Atlantic Immigration Program helps designated employers like you hire qualified candidates for jobs they haven’t been able to fill locally. These candidates can be overseas or living in Canada as temporary residents.
If you and the candidate meet all the requirements, the candidate may then apply for permanent resident status in Canada.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
